title: registry Configuration
description: Configuration for the registry service, including credentials and repository URLs

credRef.title: Credential Reference
credRef.description: Reference to an external Credential, resolved at runtime through the Secret Store

credId.description: Identifier of the referenced Credential entry

property.description: Optional property name to read from a multi-field Credential

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for accessing the registry service. Accepts a plain string (for example the `envgen.creds.get` macro for a local Credential) or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for accessing the registry service. Accepts a plain string (for example the `envgen.creds.get` macro for a local Credential) or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential

releaseRepository.title: Release Repository
releaseRepository.description: URL of the release repository in registry

snapshotRepository.title: Snapshot Repository
snapshotRepository.description: URL of the snapshot repository in registry

stagingRepository.title: Staging Repository
stagingRepository.description: URL of the staging repository in registry

proxyRepository.title: Proxy Repository
proxyRepository.description: URL of the proxy repository in registry

releaseTemplateRepository.title: Release Template Repository
releaseTemplateRepository.description: URL of the release template repository in registry

snapshotTemplateRepository.title: Snapshot Template Repository
snapshotTemplateRepository.description: URL of the snapshot template repository in registry

stagingTemplateRepository.title: Staging Template Repository
stagingTemplateRepository.description: URL of the staging template repository in registry
